name: Judy Alvarez
requirements: Female V, feminine body type and voice
critical_choice: In Pisces, side with Judy NOT Maiko. In Pyramid Song, dive together and stay the night.
ending_impact: Appears in The Star ending. Leaves Night City with V and the Aldecaldos.

name: Panam Palmer
quest_line: With a Little Help from My Friends
critical_choice: In Queen of the Highway, agree to sync in the Basilisk tank. Choose all romantic dialogue options.
ending_impact: Essential for The Star ending (best ending). She leads the Aldecaldos to help V storm Arasaka.

name: River Ward
critical_choice: In The Hunt, save Randy. In Following the River, accept dinner invitation and kiss River on the water tower.
ending_impact: Calls during endings. Minor narrative impact.

name: Kerry Eurodyne
critical_choice: Complete ALL side quests in order. Choose romantic options during Boat Drinks on the yacht.
ending_impact: Calls during endings. Minor narrative impact.
